name: Johnny Trigger 3D Online - Action Shooter
description: In this cool gun shooting game Johnny Trigger 3D Online, the characters we control will use various somersaults to avoid obstacles. You will become the most potent agent, skillfully use your shooting skills on different levels, and try to kill the enemy with one hit in Johnny Trigger 3D Online!
